hero.subtitle: Sv. Martin, Podstrana — 10 meters from the sea

r1.text: "A perfect family holiday. The beach is literally at the door, the kids were thrilled. The apartment is clean, well-equipped and has everything you need. We'll definitely be back!"
r1.author: — Maja K., Sarajevo

r2.text: "Right on the sea, peaceful setting, very friendly hosts. The terrace with sea view was a pleasure every evening. Highly recommended!"
r2.author: — Thomas B., Munich

r3.text: "A wonderful place right by the beach. Large, clean apartment with a beautiful sea view. Ante and Irena are wonderful hosts, always helpful."
r3.author: — Katarzyna W., Kraków

r4.text: "The location is unbeatable — the sea literally within reach. The hosts are kind and always available. This is a place we'll recommend to all our friends."
r4.author: — Nikola P., Belgrade

location.title: Location
location.excursions: From Podstrana you can easily take boat trips to the islands of Brač, Hvar and Šolta. Nearby you'll also find horse riding and Mount Perun for hiking.

contact.title: Book your stay
contact.subtitle: Contact us directly and arrange your stay without middlemen.
